name: Inventory Management AI MCP
description: Stock control toolkit: reorder points, demand forecasting, SKU optimization, warehouse layout, and shrinkage detection. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: reorder_point
tools.description: Calculate optimal reorder point, safety stock, and economic order quantity

tools.name: demand_forecast
tools.description: Forecast future demand from historical sales data with confidence intervals.

tools.name: sku_optimizer
tools.description: Classify SKUs using ABC/XYZ analysis and recommend inventory strategies.

tools.name: warehouse_layout
tools.description: Plan warehouse zone layout optimized for picking efficiency.

tools.name: shrinkage_detector
tools.description: Detect inventory shrinkage by comparing expected vs actual quantities.
